title: senecio mathewsii
intro: Senecio mathewsii, also known as Mathews' ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio mathewsii include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Senecio mathewsii can be prepared as an infusion, tincture, or ointment for its medicinal uses.
